The [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] '''StarMite light freighter''', often called simply the '''Starmite''', was a light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] in use during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. About 2/3rds the size of a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], it had a blunt, rounded bow. It had thick stubby wings and rounded thick body that narrowed back to a flattened tail section. It did not work well with modifications, particularly those made with non-SoroSuub parts. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] ''[[Bria]]'' was a heavily-modified ''Starmite''-class freighter.

{{Ship-stub}}
